topic: Assigning Transport Route to Individual Students
summary: This topic explains how to manually assign a specific transport route and pick-up point to an individual student from their student profile. This process automatically links the student to the defined transport fees.
steps: Select the desired student from the list.
Click on 'Detail' to open the student's profile.
A pop-up window will appear. Select the 'Route' from the dropdown list.
Select the 'Pick-up Point' from the dropdown list for the chosen route.
The corresponding 'Amount' for the selected route and pick-up point will automatically be fetched and displayed.
Optionally, toggle 'Select a different route' if the drop point differs from the pick-up point route.
Select the 'Installment(s)' for which the transport fee should be applied.
Click 'Assign' to save the transport route to the student.
business_rules: The system automatically retrieves the transport amount based on the selected route and pick-up point, as defined in the 'Vehicle Route' setup.
Once assigned, the transport amount will be added to the student's fee demand for the specified installments.
important_notes: This method is for assigning transport to individual students. For bulk assignments, use the 'Transport Excel Upload' feature.
After assignment, the transport fees will be visible in the student's fee demand.
questions: How do I manually assign a transport route to a single student?
Where can I see the transport fees applied to a student after assignment?
Can I assign different pick-up and drop points for a student?
What happens to the student's fee demand after assigning a transport route?
related_topics: Defining Vehicle Routes and Pick-up Points
